miguel.name: Dr. Miguel Riesco Albizu
miguel.desc: PhD from the University of Oviedo (2002) and professor at the EII (School of Computer Engineering) of the University of Oviedo.

clipboard.title: Clipboard++
clipboard.desc: Clipboard++ multiplies the Windows clipboard by 20, reducing time lost when copying and pasting content.

organizo.title: Organizo
organizo.desc: Organizo is a TODO app characterized by its composite tasks. Developed for Android mobiles in Kotlin.

carrousel.title: Image Carrousel
carrousel.desc: React-native-image-carrousel is a React Native component that allows developers to implement an image carousel effectively.

hobbies.title: Hobbies
hobbies.titleBody: And Mario, what do you like to do?

it.title: Computer Science
it.desc1: Since I was a child, I've been interested in computers and knowing how things really work, taking a bit of the magic out of things. Luckily, I've been able to expand my knowledge in this field with my university studies.

cooking.title: Cooking
cooking.desc1: To be honest, I prefer eating to cooking, who doesn't? In order to keep up with my appetite and try new things, I've ended up learning how to cook little by little.
cooking.desc2: In addition to satisfying this desire, by learning to cook, I have managed to understand other cultures a bit and understand how there is always a use for everything, and that to judge well, the best thing you can do is close your eyes.

music.title: Music
music.desc1: Music accompanies me almost everywhere I go alone today. And although I like to grab a wooden spoon and use it as a microphone from time to time, the music I consume most is LOFI; I use it to concentrate when working. Here is a track from this audio:
music.desc2: Music track: Bean by Lukrembo Source: https://freetouse.com/music No Copyright Background Music

anime.title: Anime and Manga
anime.desc1: For the rest of my free time, I like to disconnect from the world in some way. Everyone manages to do this in their own way, and I like to watch anime and read manga; the latter is usually because I can't wait for the next animated chapter 🙃.
anime.desc2: I would like to highlight one very famous anime out of all the ones I've seen, One Piece. Today it has become almost a global reference for various values such as freedom. The latest news of these events has been in the revolution in Nepal where young people have risen up against a corrupt government. Something very similar to one of the best moments of One Piece that I have clipped in this video:
